_meta.description: Scholarship data for UK, Ireland, and Dubai — structured for easy filtering and retrieval by the Fateh Education AI counselling bot.
_meta.currency_note: UK scholarships in GBP. Ireland in EUR. Dubai in AED. Use live_metrics for INR conversion.
_meta.usage_tip: Filter by country + funding_level + eligible_nationalities for quickest match. Use level_of_study to separate UG vs Masters vs PhD. Check application_window_month to identify open/upcoming scholarships.

scholarships.name: Chevening Scholarships
scholarships.funded_by: UK Foreign Commonwealth & Development Office (FCDO) + partner organisations
scholarships.subject_restriction: Any subject — must be 1-year taught Masters
scholarships.description: UK Government's flagship international scholarship programme. Fully funded 1-year Masters at any UK university. Selects future leaders and decision-makers.
covers: Monthly living allowance (London and outside London rates)
Economy return flights from home country
scholarships.eligible_nationalities: 140+ countries including India, Pakistan, Bangladesh, Sri Lanka

india_specific.note: India has one of the largest Chevening programmes globally.

eligibility.work_experience: Minimum 2 years full-time (2,800 hours) post-graduation — MANDATORY
eligibility.university_offers: Must have 3 UK university choices — offer required by specific deadline
eligibility.return_commitment: Must return to home country for minimum 2 years after scholarship ends

scholarships.selection_process: Reading committee → Shortlist → Embassy interview → Final selection
scholarships.tips: Rewards clear career vision, demonstrated leadership, and community impact. Work experience is mandatory — cannot apply without 2,800 hours. Prepare strong statement of purpose and leadership examples.

scholarships.name: GREAT Scholarships (India)
scholarships.funded_by: UK Government GREAT Britain Campaign + British Council + participating UK universities
scholarships.subject_restriction: Varies by university — check individual university pages
scholarships.description: Minimum £10,000 towards tuition for a one-year taught postgraduate course. For students from India at participating UK universities.

india_specific.note: 12 scholarships available for Indian students in 2026–27 academic year.

eligibility.citizenship: Must be a citizen of India
eligibility.degree: Must hold an undergraduate degree meeting the entry requirements of the specific university
eligibility.english: Must meet the English language requirements of the specific university

participating_universities_2026_27: University of the West of England
scholarships.application_note: Apply directly to individual university — deadline varies by institution (typically January–June)
scholarships.tips: Apply early to individual universities. Deadlines vary — check each university page. Can be combined with university merit scholarships in some cases.

scholarships.name: Commonwealth Masters Scholarships
scholarships.subject_restriction: Taught Masters — check CSC list. Priority areas: STEM, health, education, development
scholarships.description: Fully funded Masters for citizens of developing Commonwealth countries. Covers all costs including travel. For those who could not otherwise study in the UK.

india_specific.note: India is a developing Commonwealth country — eligible. Competition is high.

eligibility.citizenship: Citizen of a developing Commonwealth country
eligibility.degree: First class or 2:1 equivalent (60%+ for Indian students)
eligibility.residency: Must not be ordinarily resident in the UK
eligibility.financial_need: Priority given to those who cannot otherwise afford UK study

scholarships.application_note: Typically opens October, deadline December each year. Apply through Indian national nominating agency.
scholarships.tips: Strong academic record plus demonstrated financial need. Submit through the national nominating agency in India (often Ministry of Education).

scholarships.name: Gates Cambridge Scholarships
scholarships.subject_restriction: Any subject at the University of Cambridge only
scholarships.description: Prestigious fully funded scholarship for exceptional non-UK students to pursue postgraduate study at the University of Cambridge. Selects scholars for academic excellence and commitment to improving lives.

india_specific.note: ~80 awards globally per year — extremely competitive.

eligibility.degree: Outstanding academic record — typically first class
eligibility.university_application: Must apply to Cambridge course simultaneously
eligibility.personal_qualities: Leadership potential, commitment to improving others' lives, good fit with Cambridge

scholarships.application_note: Apply with Cambridge admission application — separate scholarship form within Cambridge portal.
scholarships.tips: Extremely competitive — ~80 awards globally. Must demonstrate both exceptional academic excellence and a commitment to improving lives.

scholarships.name: Scotland's Saltire Scholarships
scholarships.subject_restriction: Science, Technology, Creative Industries, Healthcare, Renewable Energy
scholarships.description: £8,000 towards Masters tuition fees for students from selected countries studying in Scotland. Part of Scotland's strategy to attract international talent.

india_specific.note: India is one of the priority nationalities. Over 25 scholarships available for Indian students.

eligibility.citizenship: Citizen of India, China, Canada, Japan, Pakistan, or USA
eligibility.level: Full-time Masters at a Scottish university
eligibility.subject: Science, Technology, Creative Industries, Healthcare, or Renewable Energy

scholarships.eligible_universities: Any Scottish university (Edinburgh, Glasgow, Heriot-Watt, Strathclyde, Dundee, Aberdeen, etc.)
scholarships.application_note: Apply through scotland.org. Typically opens February, deadline June each year.
scholarships.tips: Good for STEM students going to Scottish universities. Can be combined with university-level scholarships in some cases.

scholarships.name: Clarendon Fund Scholarships
scholarships.subject_restriction: Any subject at the University of Oxford only
scholarships.description: Prestigious fully funded scholarships for academically excellent graduate students at the University of Oxford.

india_specific.note: Automatically considered when applying to Oxford graduate courses — no separate application.

eligibility.citizenship: All nationalities — must be enrolled in an eligible Oxford graduate course
eligibility.degree: Outstanding academic record — typically first class
eligibility.automatic: Automatically considered during Oxford admissions — no separate application required

scholarships.application_note: Automatically considered when you apply for an Oxford graduate course. Apply to Oxford by the relevant course deadline.
scholarships.tips: No separate application needed. Your Oxford application IS your Clarendon application. Apply by the earliest Oxford deadline for best consideration.

scholarships.name: Weidenfeld-Hoffmann Scholarships (Oxford)
scholarships.subject_restriction: Any subject at Oxford — emphasis on leadership and public service
eligible_subjects: All (at Oxford) — focus on social sciences, public policy, governance
scholarships.description: Fully funded Oxford scholarships plus a leadership development programme. For students from developing countries with commitment to making a positive impact.
scholarships.amount_summary: Full tuition + living expenses + leadership programme
scholarships.eligible_nationalities: Students from developing countries — India eligible

india_specific.note: India is an eligible country. Emphasis on future leaders who will return and contribute.

eligibility.citizenship: Citizen of an eligible developing country — India included
eligibility.personal_qualities: Leadership potential, commitment to public service and improving society

scholarships.application_note: Apply through Oxford graduate admissions — separate scholarship form required.
scholarships.tips: Strong emphasis on future leaders who will create positive impact in their home country. Personal statement of leadership vision is critical.

scholarships.name: Inlaks Shivdasani Foundation Scholarships
scholarships.subject_restriction: Arts, Sciences, Humanities, Business — at top UK/USA universities
scholarships.description: Covers tuition, living expenses, and travel for Indian students studying at top UK and US universities. One of the most prestigious Indian private scholarships for overseas study.

india_specific.note: Only for Indian nationals. Strong alumni network and mentoring.

eligibility.universities: Top-ranked UK and US institutions only (Russell Group / Ivy League equivalent)

scholarships.application_note: Annual cycle — check inlaksfoundation.org for exact dates each year.
scholarships.tips: Highly prestigious Indian scholarship. Requires admission to a top-ranked university first. Strong academic record and personal statement are essential.

scholarships.name: JN Tata Endowment Loan Scholarship
scholarships.subject_restriction: Any subject at recognised overseas universities
scholarships.description: Low-interest loan scholarship for Indian students pursuing Masters, Doctoral, and Postdoctoral courses abroad, including UK. Has helped 5,600+ students.
scholarships.amount_summary: Loan scholarship — low interest, repayable after study
covers: Partial tuition and living costs via low-interest loan

india_specific.note: Only for Indian nationals. Strong legacy — one of oldest Indian overseas study scholarships.

scholarships.application_note: Annual cycle — check jntataendowment.com for exact dates.
scholarships.tips: Loan must be repaid but at very low interest. Good safety net if other scholarships don't come through.

scholarships.name: Charles Wallace India Trust Scholarships
scholarships.administering_body: Charles Wallace India Trust (British Council managed)
scholarships.subject_restriction: Arts, Heritage conservation, Humanities, Music, Dance, Performing Arts, Creative fields
scholarships.description: Scholarships and fellowships for mid-career Indian professionals in arts, heritage conservation, and humanities for short-term training or residencies in the UK.

india_specific.note: Only for Indian nationals, preferably mid-career professionals aged late 20s to mid-40s.

eligibility.career_stage: Mid-career professionals — late 20s to mid-40s preferred
eligibility.subject: Arts, heritage, humanities, creative fields

scholarships.tips: Not for full degree programs — suited for specific training, residencies, or fellowships.

scholarships.name: UCL Global Masters Scholarship
scholarships.subject_restriction: Any Masters program at UCL
scholarships.description: £5,000 towards tuition fees for international Masters students at UCL. Merit-based award for first Masters application.
scholarships.tips: Apply early — deadline is January annually. Strong academic profile required.

scholarships.name: University of Edinburgh India Scholarship
scholarships.subject_restriction: On-campus PG Masters at Edinburgh
eligible_subjects: All on-campus PG Masters at Edinburgh
scholarships.description: £5,000 towards tuition for gifted Indian international Masters students. Automatically considered when you apply — no separate application.

india_specific.note: Only for Indian nationals. Automatic — no extra application needed.

eligibility.condition: Strong academic record — automatically assessed during admissions

scholarships.application_note: Automatically considered when you apply to a Masters at Edinburgh. No separate scholarship application needed.
scholarships.tips: One of the best automatic scholarships for Indian students. Apply to Edinburgh Masters early to be considered.

scholarships.name: Women in STEM South Asia Scholarship (Edinburgh)
scholarships.subject_restriction: STEM Masters at University of Edinburgh only
scholarships.description: Fully funded scholarship for women from South Asia studying STEM Masters at the University of Edinburgh. Covers tuition and living expenses.

india_specific.note: India is a priority country. Only for women from South Asia.

eligibility.citizenship: Citizen of India, Pakistan, Sri Lanka, Bangladesh, or Nepal
eligibility.level: STEM Masters at University of Edinburgh specifically
eligibility.subject: STEM fields only

scholarships.tips: Highly competitive but extremely valuable if eligible. Requires STEM Masters at Edinburgh specifically.

scholarships.name: Global Futures Scholarship — South Asia (Manchester)
scholarships.subject_restriction: Most UG and Masters programs at University of Manchester (excluding Medicine, Dentistry, Architecture)
scholarships.description: £10,000 scholarship (per year for UG, one-time for Masters) for students from South Asia including India, Bangladesh, Pakistan, Sri Lanka.
scholarships.amount_summary: £10,000 (UG: per year for 3 years; Masters: £10,000 one-time)

india_specific.note: India is a primary eligible country.

eligibility.citizenship: Domiciled in India, Bangladesh, Pakistan, or Sri Lanka
eligibility.condition: Must have applied and received a conditional or unconditional offer

scholarships.application_note: Application form emailed automatically after receiving a course offer. No need to seek it separately.
scholarships.tips: One of the most accessible major UK scholarships for Indian students. Available to both UG and Masters applicants. Apply to Manchester early.

scholarships.name: Nottingham Developing Solutions Scholarship
scholarships.subject_restriction: Most Masters programs — some exclusions. Check university website.
eligible_subjects: Most subjects — check individual program eligibility
scholarships.description: 50% or 100% tuition waiver for students from developing countries including India. One of the most generous university scholarships in the UK.
covers: 50% or 100% tuition fees depending on award band
eligible_nationalities: and other developing countries — check official list

eligibility.citizenship: Must be from a developing country — India eligible
eligibility.degree: Strong academic record — first class preferred

scholarships.application_note: Deadline typically February each year. Separate application required.
scholarships.tips: Very competitive but one of the most generous university scholarships in the UK for developing country students.

scholarships.name: Think Big Scholarship (Bristol)
scholarships.subject_restriction: Most programs at Bristol — check specific program
scholarships.description: Up to £20,000 towards tuition for international students at the University of Bristol. Available for both UG and PG students.
scholarships.application_note: Two deadlines: February and June each year.
scholarships.tips: Apply in February for priority consideration. GREAT Scholarship also available at Bristol — can be combined in some cases.

scholarships.name: Vice-Chancellor's International Scholarship (Queen's Belfast)
scholarships.subject_restriction: Most Masters programs at Queen's Belfast
scholarships.description: £3,000 merit-based scholarship for international Masters students at Queen's University Belfast. One of UK's most affordable Russell Group universities.
scholarships.tips: Belfast has the lowest cost of living in the UK — combine this scholarship with affordable living to maximise value. Also eligible for GREAT Scholarship.

scholarships.name: Government of Ireland International Education Scholarship (GOI-IES)
scholarships.funded_by: Government of Ireland + Irish Higher Education Institutions (HEIs)
scholarships.subject_restriction: All subjects at eligible Irish HEIs — check institution-specific eligible programs
eligible_subjects: All (check individual HEI for eligible programs)
scholarships.description: 60 fully funded scholarships per year for outstanding non-EU/EEA international students studying Masters or PhD in Ireland. Full tuition waiver + €10,000 stipend. One of the best scholarships for studying in Ireland.
covers: Full tuition fees (waived by host institution)
scholarships.eligible_nationalities: All non-EU/EEA countries excluding Switzerland and UK — India eligible

india_specific.note: India is an eligible country. 60 scholarships across all Irish HEIs — competitive.

eligibility.citizenship: Non-EU/EEA, non-Swiss, non-UK domicile of origin — India eligible
eligibility.offer_required: Must have a conditional or unconditional offer from an eligible Irish HEI at time of applying
eligibility.previous_holder: Cannot apply if previously awarded a GOI-IES scholarship
eligibility.excluded: Russian and Belarusian nationals are not eligible

eligible_institutions: and other eligible Irish HEIs — see official HEA list
scholarships.application_note: Must secure an offer from an eligible Irish university FIRST, then apply via the HEA GOI-IES online portal. Only one application per candidate. Two references required.
scholarships.tips: Apply to Irish universities as early as possible — getting an offer before the March 12 deadline is critical. Strong academic record plus compelling personal statement needed. Priority given to candidates from low/lower-middle income World Bank countries.

scholarships.name: Ireland Fellows Programme
scholarships.subject_restriction: Priority areas: Agriculture, food security, health, governance, education, environment
scholarships.description: Fully funded fellowships for candidates from select developing countries for Masters study in Ireland. Part of Ireland's overseas development aid programme.
scholarships.eligible_nationalities: Specific developing countries — check official list (India may be eligible for some cohorts)

india_specific.india_eligible: Check official list — India's eligibility may vary by year
india_specific.note: This programme targets specific developing countries. Confirm India's eligibility for current year.

eligibility.citizenship: Citizen of an eligible developing country

scholarships.tips: Check eligibility list each year — countries rotate. Strong development sector background helps.

scholarships.name: TCD Global Excellence Scholarship
scholarships.subject_restriction: Most Masters programs at Trinity College Dublin
scholarships.description: €5,000 towards tuition for academically excellent international Masters students at Trinity College Dublin.
scholarships.tips: Can be combined with GOI-IES in some cases. Apply to TCD early.

scholarships.name: UCD Global Excellence Scholarship
scholarships.subject_restriction: Most Masters programs at UCD
scholarships.description: €3,000 towards tuition for academically excellent international Masters students at UCD.
scholarships.tips: UCD is Ireland's top university for graduate employment. Tech giants nearby in Dublin's Silicon Docks.

scholarships.name: UCC International Scholarship
scholarships.subject_restriction: Most Masters programs at UCC
scholarships.description: €2,000 merit-based scholarship for international Masters students at UCC. More affordable university with lower living costs than Dublin.
scholarships.tips: Cork is more affordable than Dublin. Apple and Amazon offices nearby. UCC is Ireland's first 5-star university.

scholarships.name: Heriot-Watt University Dubai Merit Scholarship
scholarships.subject_restriction: All programs at Heriot-Watt Dubai
scholarships.description: Tuition fee reduction based on academic performance. Percentage discount varies by grade band. Available for both UG and PG students.
scholarships.amount_summary: Tuition fee reduction (% based on grades)
scholarships.amount_note: Percentage-based discount on tuition — varies by grade band

eligibility.degree: Strong academic record — higher discount for higher grades
eligibility.level: UG or Masters at Heriot-Watt Dubai

scholarships.application_note: Applied automatically during admissions based on academic grades. Also check for specific scholarship windows.
scholarships.tips: Dubai campus offers the same UK degree as Edinburgh campus but at lower cost and in a tax-free environment. Good for those who want a UK degree without living in the UK.

scholarships.name: University of Birmingham Dubai Merit Scholarship
scholarships.subject_restriction: All programs at University of Birmingham Dubai
scholarships.description: Partial tuition reduction for high-achieving international Masters students at the University of Birmingham Dubai campus.
scholarships.amount_note: Partial reduction — contact admissions for exact amounts
scholarships.tips: Full Russell Group campus in Dubai. Same degree as UK Birmingham. Better choice for students wanting Russell Group quality in the Middle East.
